nasb.text: Solomon made all the furniture which was in the house of the Lord: the golden altar and the golden table on which was the bread of the Presence;

esv.text: So Solomon made all the vessels that were in the house of the Lord: the golden altar, the golden table for the bread of the Presence,

cnv.text: 所羅門又做了耶和華殿裡的一切器具，就是金壇和放陳設餅的桌子，

ccb.text: 所罗门又为耶和华的殿造了以下器具：金坛、放供饼的金桌；
